## Regras propostas

```yaml
name: meu-pack
version: "0.1.0"
description: Descrição do pack.

rules:
  - id: regra-1
    description: O que essa regra detecta
    patterns: [keyword1, keyword2]
    decision: REQUIRE_APPROVAL
    reasons: [touches_sensitive_area]
```
